Event: Cornucopia Island May 2025
Event Date: 19/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A223
Pocket Converter

Triggers: 3 sec

Magic Recharge
The artifact owner's magic armor piercing and spell power are increased by 20% for every enemy unit affected by a movement restricting effect, stun, freeze, petrifaction, jelly, or fear.

Once in a while 2 random enemy units are struck by lightning every 1,5 sec for 6 sec. The target takes 350000 magic damage and has a 50% chance to be stunned for 2 sec. The artifact owner gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 65% of the damage dealt by the ability. The shield blocks damage of any type and lasts 4 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
